What we build

Every fence line, sorted.

One crew for the whole job — supply, removal of the old fence, and a clean install you won't have to think about again.

Paling & Colorbond fencing

Classic timber paling and durable Colorbond — done properly and built to last.

Glass & pool fencing

Glass and safety pool fencing that complies with current QLD pool safety laws — certification-ready.

Feature fencing

Standout feature and privacy fencing that lifts the look of the whole property.

Retaining walls

Timber, concrete sleeper and composite retaining walls — level out the block and hold it for good.

Custom gates

A wide range of custom gates to match your fence — built to fit and made to swing true.

Demolition & landscaping

Old fence removal plus full landscaping — including kid kanga hire with an operator.

Pick your finish

Powdercoat colours to suit the street.

Recent work

Built across the Bay.

A look at jobs done right the first time — from pool fencing to automatic gates and everything between.

Our story

Built on three generations of craftsmanship.

Our founder was raised by a German immigrant father — a carpenter, builder and true craftsman with a legendary eye for detail. Building has been in the family blood ever since.

Today Schmick Fencing is a family business through and through, led by a dedicated team and a great crew who've earned a hardworking, quality-driven reputation across the region. In 2011 Michael joined, bringing deep local roots, a network of trusted tradesmen, and attention to detail that's second to none.

Based in Deception Bay and Burpengary for over 25 years, we're proud to give back to the community that supports us — currently backing the Burpengary Jets Junior Rugby League team.

40Years industry experience
25+Years serving the local area
100%Focus on customer satisfaction
FamilyOwned & operated
Why locals choose us

No-drama fencing, start to finish.

  • Fixed quotes, no surprises. The price we measure is the price you pay.
  • We turn up. Booked time, real arrival — no ghosting, no excuses.
  • Old fence gone, site left clean. Removal and tip runs included.
  • Workmanship guarantee. Built to last, backed in writing.
24/7

We never miss a lead.

Most fencing jobs are lost because nobody answered the phone. Our quote assistant captures every enquiry — even at 9pm on a Sunday — and books the measure while you sleep.
